Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Andra Agnos]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Andra is a sibling of Lycus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Andra is thirteen years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Andra and Lycus were trapped in a cave for almost a whole day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Andra and Lycus live behind a mushroom-cap door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — Andra is a child who was with Simon in the cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — Andra is currently inside the cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Andra was found curled up on a rock promontory above the rock-worms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Andra is a person whom Simon rescued.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Andra tries to stop Simon from killing Erastes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Andra has known Erastes all her life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Andra Agnos has the sword but none of the other gifts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Andra Agnos can currently only open her bedroom, the garden, and the bath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Andra brought five healthy sons and daughters to the Nye.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Andra has a tendency to get excited over small things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Simon saved Andra Agnos' life in Orgrith Cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Andra Agnos waved to Simon from down a hallway before vanishing into a bedroom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Andra is unable to make something work in the workshop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Andra has long blond hair.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Andra is the daughter of Olissa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Andra Agnos is the youngest Valinhall Traveler and the daughter of Olissa and Caius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Andra suggested that it would escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Andra Agnos is Lycus's sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Andra Agnos is a Valinhall Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Andra Agnos has chain-shaped marks on her arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Andra possesses a lightly curved blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Andra is fighting the Tartarus Incarnation with a Dragon's Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Andra is a young girl Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Andra uses the sword Seijan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Andra ran forward to help during the Incarnation's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Andra is a person Simon suspects might have pounded on his door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Andra is a person Indirial mentions in relation to the Dragon's Fangs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Andra carries an ordinary sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Andra was present in Simon's bedroom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Andra is present and readying her sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Andra has a Dragon's Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Andra is part of a group intended to separate enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon gives orders to Andra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Andra is a blond girl with a black-spotted sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Andra fought the Ornheim Incarnation's golems.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
